nodes.name: Chestnut-crowned sparrow-weaver
nodes.summary: The chestnut-crowned sparrow-weaver (Plocepasser superciliosus) is a species of bird in the family Ploceidae. It is found in Africa south of the Sahara, from Senegal and Gambia to Eritrea, Ethiopia and western Kenya. References External links Species text in Weaver Watch. Chestnut-crowned sparrow-weaver on the Internet Bird Collection

nodes.name: Plocepasser
nodes.summary: Plocepasser（Plocepasser）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联4种鸟类，如White-browed sparrow-weaver、Donaldson Smith's sparrow-weaver、Chestnut-crowned sparrow-weaver等4种鸟类。
